steps.title: Read the while contrast
steps.content: The underlined sentence says horizontal gene transfer is common among prokaryotes but rarely observed among eukaryotes. Its function is to contrast detection frequency across two organism categories.

steps.title: Eliminate shifted functions
steps.content: A shifts to mechanics, C shifts to a flawed perception introduced later, and D claims similarity. The sentence instead compares how often one biological phenomenon has been detected in the two groups. The answer is B.
